Requirements 6.0.4 API

Modules 
Module Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.annotations
Annotations used by the library.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.generator
Code generators.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.maven_plugin  
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.natives
Optional features that require access to native libraries, such as the use of ANSI colors.
